hero.description: Upload a photo of your notebook. Our AI creates a complete, organized study course in seconds. No more messy notes — just clear, structured learning.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to transform your handwritten notes into structured study material.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Take a photo of your notebook page or upload an image. Handwritten or typed — we handle both.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our AI reads your notes, extracts key concepts, formulas, and diagrams automatically.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Receive a beautifully organized course with explanations, key points, and a clear structure.

features.title: Everything You Need to Study Smarter
features.subtitle: Powerful features designed to help you learn more effectively.
features.handwritingDesc: Works with handwriting, diagrams, and formulas. Our AI understands your unique writing style.
features.instantDesc: Get your organized study course in seconds, not hours. AI does the heavy lifting for you.
features.explanationsDesc: Each concept is explained clearly with context from your original notes. Better understanding, guaranteed.
features.structureDesc: Content is organized into logical sections with key concepts, examples, and summaries.
features.mobileDesc: Access your courses anywhere. Take photos from your phone and study on the go.
features.securityDesc: Your notes are yours. We never share your content, and all data is encrypted.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Notes?
cta.subtitle: Join students who are already studying smarter with X+1. Get started for free — no credit card required.
